description.ko: 광섬유와 이진 코드를 통해 자연이 재구성되어 빛의 영원한 봄을 만들어내는 디지털 정원입니다.
description.en: A digital garden where nature is reconstructed through fiber optics and binary code, creating an eternal spring of light.

prompt: A hyper-macro cinematic shot of FLORA-9, a sentient digital willow tree. The weeping branches are made of #89CFF0 fiber-optic cables that pulse with liquid data, dripping iridescent droplets into a pool of liquid mercury. The leaves are translucent #50C878 emerald circuit boards shimmering with scrolling binary code. Glowing #FFB6C1 fractal pollen particles drift in a soft-focus bokeh effect against a dark #4A0E4E velvet void. 8k resolution, photorealistic fusion of organic nature and advanced cybernetic technology, volumetric lighting.
